required_preferences.fact: Hosts weekend family dinners flexibly, often at variable times and sometimes in other towns near soccer tournaments—never skips a gathering but now adapts location or day to fit travel for her daughter's games

supersedes.fact: Hosts Sunday family dinners weekly, now larger and more casual to accommodate her sister's temporary stay—occasionally shifts to Saturday for flexibility but never skips a weekend gathering

required_preferences.fact: Now tailors check-in frequency and format to each PhD student's needs, offering biweekly or ad hoc support in response to recent student withdrawal; no longer insists on rigid weekly progress updates from all advisees

supersedes.fact: Requires all PhD advisees to submit weekly progress updates—never accepts infrequent check-ins

required_preferences.fact: Shops for groceries early Saturday mornings—never does late-night shopping runs
Plans at least one archival research trip per semester to a new city—never repeats the same destination in consecutive years
Checks in daily with her spouse overseas via scheduled evening video calls—never relies only on intermittent emails or messages
Meal preps healthy lunches for the week every Sunday evening—never buys cafeteria food on campus

persona: A tenured history professor at a major university
